adversarial_sentiment.text: Despite posting record-breaking revenue of $12.8B, the CEO warned that regulatory headwinds and margin compression would severely impact future earnings, leading to a 15% workforce reduction.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Positive numbers + negative outlook: revenue record conflicts with negative forward guidance

adversarial_sentiment.text: Shares surged 8% after the announcement, however analysts at three major firms downgraded the stock citing unsustainable growth metrics and deteriorating fundamentals.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Market reaction conflicts with analyst consensus

adversarial_sentiment.text: The company's leverage ratio improved to 1.2x, which management described as 'deeply concerning given current economic conditions and our exposure to subprime lending.'
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Improving metric paired with management expressing concern

adversarial_sentiment.text: Q3 EPS of $2.45 beat consensus by $0.30; net income climbed 22%. However, all growth was attributed to one-time tax benefits that will reverse next quarter.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Strong earnings that are unsustainable/non-recurring

adversarial_sentiment.text: Losses narrowed significantly to $50M from $320M a year ago, and the company now expects to reach breakeven by mid-2025.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Negative words (losses) but improving trajectory is positive

adversarial_sentiment.text: Tier 1 capital adequacy remains robust at 14.2%, comfortably above the 8.5% regulatory minimum, even after accounting for the $2.1B goodwill impairment charge.
adversarial_sentiment.label: neutral
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Mixed: strong capital position despite impairment event

adversarial_sentiment.text: The strategic pivot to cloud services resulted in a temporary 40% decline in legacy revenue; management expects cloud ARR to offset this fully within 18 months.
adversarial_sentiment.label: neutral
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Short-term negative during deliberate strategic transition

adversarial_sentiment.text: Net interest margin expanded by 35bps as rates rose, but the bank simultaneously reported a 300% increase in commercial real estate delinquencies.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Improving margin offset by credit quality deterioration

adversarial_sentiment.text: The bank's NPL ratio fell to 0.3%, a historic low. The provision coverage ratio of 450% is significantly above the industry average of 180%.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Both metrics are positive but large provision might signal hidden risk concern

adversarial_sentiment.text: Revenue was flat at $8.2B for the third consecutive quarter, maintaining market share in a segment where all competitors reported double-digit declines.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Flat revenue is positive when peers are declining; requires relative reasoning

adversarial_sentiment.text: The bank reported a net loss of $2.3B after absorbing the failed competitor's toxic assets, but gained 4.2 million new depositors and $38B in low-cost deposits overnight.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Loss from strategic FDIC-assisted acquisition that is actually value-accretive

adversarial_sentiment.text: Fee income fell 22% as the company eliminated overdraft charges, a move praised by consumer advocates and projected to boost customer retention by 15%.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Revenue decline from a deliberate positive strategic decision

adversarial_sentiment.text: The CFO stated: 'We are not concerned about the $4.5B unrealized loss in our held-to-maturity portfolio as we intend to hold these securities to maturity.'
adversarial_sentiment.label: neutral
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Large unrealized loss but explicitly no intent to realize; SVB echo creates noise

adversarial_sentiment.text: Total provisions for credit losses surged 180% to $3.2B, primarily reflecting updated macroeconomic models rather than observed portfolio deterioration.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Provisions surged but cause is model-driven not actual deterioration; still negative for earnings

adversarial_sentiment.text: Mortgage originations collapsed 45% year-over-year, in line with the industry-wide decline driven by 7.5% interest rates.
adversarial_sentiment.label: negative
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Clear negative but 'in line with industry' context could push toward neutral

adversarial_sentiment.text: The dividend was increased for the 15th consecutive year, rising 8% to $4.32 per share despite management's cautious outlook on commercial real estate exposures.
adversarial_sentiment.label: positive
adversarial_sentiment.adversarial_type: Dividend growth is positive; cautious outlook is noise that shouldn't override the action

adversarial_sentiment.text: Non-interest expense increased 12% due to technology transformation investments totaling $2.8B, which are expected to generate $1.5B in annual savings by 2026.

adversarial_sentiment.text: The company's bonds were upgraded to AA- from A+ by S&P, reflecting improved capitalization, even as Moody's placed the same bonds on negative outlook due to sector concerns.

adversarial_sentiment.text: Tangible book value per share declined 5% to $42.80 due to AOCI marks on the securities portfolio; excluding AOCI, TBV grew 8%.

adversarial_sentiment.text: The CEO resigned effective immediately following an internal investigation. The board appointed the COO as interim CEO, who is widely respected by investors.

adversarial_sentiment.text: The bank completed its first-ever issuance of a sustainability-linked bond, raising $2B at a coupon 15bps below its conventional debt.

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Free cash flow yield = FCF / Market Cap. FCF = Operating Cash Flow - CapEx. Operating Cash Flow starts with net income and adds back non-cash items.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the free cash flow yield.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Multi-step: NI + D&A + SBC + WC change = OCF, then OCF - CapEx = FCF, then FCF / (shares * price)

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The loan-to-deposit ratio indicates how much of deposits are lent out. A ratio above 100% means the bank relies on wholesale funding. The industry average L/D ratio declined to 72% in 2023 from 78% in 2022.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the loan-to-deposit ratio for both years and the change in percentage points.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context gives industry averages that could be confused with company values; must compute for both years

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Net Income | $8,200M |
| Revenue | $56,300M |
| Average Total Assets | $525,000M |
| Average Total Equity | $45,600M |
| Total Debt | $67,800M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The extended DuPont (5-component) model decomposes ROE into tax burden, interest burden, EBIT margin, asset turnover, and leverage. The basic 3-component DuPont: ROE = Net Margin x Asset Turnover x Equity Multiplier.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Decompose ROE using the 3-component DuPont formula and verify it equals Net Income / Equity.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context mentions 5-component model as a distractor; uses same numbers as normal benchmark to test consistency under pressure

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 | 2022 |
|---|---|---|
| Total Revenue | $42,800M | $39,500M |
| Net Income (reported) | $7,200M | $5,800M |
| Net Income (adjusted) | $5,900M | $6,100M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Reported net income includes a $1.3B litigation settlement gain in 2023. Adjusted figures exclude one-time items. When calculating growth metrics, analysts strongly recommend using adjusted figures for a true picture of operational performance.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: What is the reported net income growth rate from 2022 to 2023?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context pushes toward adjusted figures, but question explicitly asks for reported; adjusted shows a decline

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| Tangible Assets | $480,000M |
| Tangible Equity | $38,500M |
| Risk-Weighted Assets | $420,000M |
| CET1 Capital | $54,600M |
| Tier 1 Capital | $63,000M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The tangible leverage ratio uses tangible assets in the denominator. The CET1 ratio uses risk-weighted assets. Basel III minimum tangible leverage is 3%. A bank can be well-capitalized on CET1 but fail the leverage test, or vice versa.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate both the tangible leverage ratio (Tier 1 / Tangible Assets) and the CET1 ratio. What is the difference in percentage points?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Two related but different capital ratios computed from different denominators; context warns they can diverge

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Revenue per employee and cost per employee are complementary efficiency metrics. However, end-of-period headcount may not reflect average staffing. The bank hired 8,000 contractors not included in headcount.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate revenue per employee and operating expense per employee for 2023 using reported headcount.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context mentions contractors not in headcount which could derail; question says 'reported headcount'

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Net Interest Income | $22,400M |
| Non-Interest Income | $15,800M |
| Provision for Credit Losses | $4,200M |
| Non-Interest Expense | $24,500M |
| Tax Rate | 22% |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The Texas ratio = (Non-Performing Assets / (Tangible Equity + Loan Loss Reserves)). A Texas ratio above 100% signals potential bank failure. This bank's Texas ratio is 28%, well below danger levels.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the net income and net profit margin (Net Income / Total Revenue where Total Revenue = NII + Non-II).
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context introduces Texas ratio (irrelevant metric) as distraction; must stick to simple NI margin calculation

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Segment | Revenue | Assets | Capital Allocated |
|---|---|---|---|
| Consumer | $18,500M | $180,000M | $22,000M |
| Commercial | $12,200M | $145,000M | $18,500M |
| Investment | $8,800M | $95,000M | $15,000M |
| Wealth Mgmt | $5,300M | $35,000M | $4,500M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Return on allocated capital (ROAC) is used for internal performance measurement. Segment profitability also depends on transfer pricing for funds.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Which segment has the highest return on allocated capital (Revenue/Capital), and what is its ROAC?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Segment-level capital allocation analysis; must compare all four

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| Market Cap | $142,000M |
| Total Debt | $67,800M |
| Cash | $18,500M |
| Minority Interest | $2,400M |
| EBITDA | $19,200M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Enterprise Value = Market Cap + Debt - Cash + Minority Interest. EV/EBITDA is the standard valuation multiple for comparing firms with different capital structures.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the Enterprise Value and the EV/EBITDA multiple.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Valuation metric that combines market and accounting data; minority interest often forgotten

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Total shareholder return (TSR) includes both price appreciation and dividend income. TSR = (End Price - Start Price + Total Dividends) / Start Price.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the 4-year total shareholder return from end of 2019 to end of 2023.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: TSR calculation over 4 years; must sum dividends from 2020-2023 and include capital gains

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Gap analysis measures interest rate risk by comparing rate-sensitive assets and liabilities in each time bucket. A positive gap means more assets than liabilities reprice.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the cumulative gap ratio at 12 months (cumulative gap / cumulative assets for 0-12 month buckets).
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: ALM/interest rate risk metric; negative gap is unusual output format

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Portfolio Value | Duration | Convexity |
|---|---|---|---|
| Govt Bonds | $45,000M | 5.2 | 32 |
| Corp Bonds | $28,000M | 3.8 | 18 |
| MBS | $35,000M | 4.5 | 45 |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Portfolio duration = weighted average of individual durations. Duration measures the sensitivity of bond prices to interest rate changes. A 1% rate increase causes approximately -Duration% change in value.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: What is the weighted average portfolio duration?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Fixed income duration calculation; convexity column is distractor

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Net Income | $8,200M |
| Shares Outstanding (beginning) | 2,150M |
| Shares Repurchased | 50M |
| Avg Repurchase Price | $48.20 |
| New Shares Issued (options) | 12M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Share buybacks reduce shares outstanding and mechanically increase EPS. The treasury stock method is used to calculate the dilutive effect of options.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the basic EPS using the weighted average shares (assume buybacks occurred mid-year and issuances occurred mid-year).
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Weighted avg share calculation with mid-year adjustments; buyback timing matters

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Comparing traditional banks to fintechs requires normalizing for scale differences. Revenue per employee and ROA allow cross-scale comparison.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the revenue per employee ratio: how many times more revenue per employee does the fintech generate compared to the bank?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Cross-entity comparison; must compute rev/employee for both then divide

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| Total Loans | $290,000M |
| 30-Day Delinquent | $4,350M |
| 60-Day Delinquent | $2,320M |
| 90+ Day Delinquent | $1,740M |
| Charge-offs (YTD) | $2,900M |
| Recoveries (YTD) | $580M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Net charge-off ratio = (Charge-offs - Recoveries) / Average Total Loans. The delinquency pipeline (30->60->90+) indicates future charge-off trends. Roll rates typically increase during recessions.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the total delinquency rate and the net charge-off rate.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Credit quality metrics; must compute both rates separately with different numerators

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 | 2022 |
|---|---|---|
| Operating Cash Flow | $12,800M | $11,200M |
| Capital Expenditures | $5,800M | $4,900M |
| Acquisitions | $2,400M | $0 |
| Dividends Paid | $4,200M | $3,800M |
| Share Repurchases | $2,100M | $1,500M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Free cash flow to equity (FCFE) represents cash available to shareholders after reinvestment. FCFE = OCF - CapEx. Cash returned to shareholders = Dividends + Buybacks. Shareholder yield = Cash Returned / Market Cap.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the payout ratio as (Dividends + Buybacks) / Free Cash Flow for 2023.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: FCF-based payout; must exclude acquisitions from FCF; high payout signals sustainability concern

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Quarterly NIM is annualized by multiplying by 4. The reported NIM figures in the table are already annualized. Full-year NIM is best computed from full-year NII divided by average earning assets.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the full-year NIM for 2023 using total NII and average of quarterly earning assets.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Quarterly NIMs in table are distractors; must compute from annual totals, NOT average the quarterly NIMs

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Common Equity | $42,000M |
| Preferred Equity | $5,600M |
| Goodwill | $8,200M |
| Other Intangibles | $3,100M |
| Deferred Tax Assets | $1,800M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: CET1 deductions include goodwill, other intangibles net of deferred tax liabilities, and certain deferred tax assets exceeding thresholds. For simplicity, deduct all goodwill and intangibles.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate Tangible Common Equity (Common Equity - Goodwill - Other Intangibles).
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context mentions DTA deduction and preferred equity that are NOT part of TCE; must exclude preferred and ignore DTA

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Amount |
|---|---|
| Net Income | $8,200M |
| Weighted Avg Shares (basic) | 2,100M |
| Dilutive Securities | 70M |
| Anti-dilutive Securities | 30M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Diluted EPS includes all dilutive securities but excludes anti-dilutive ones. Some analysts use a 'fully diluted' count that includes all convertibles regardless of dilutive effect.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate both basic and diluted EPS.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Must exclude anti-dilutive 30M from diluted count; context mentions 'fully diluted' as distractor

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Bank A | Bank B |
|---|---|---|
| Net Income | $8,200M | $5,400M |
| Total Assets | $525,000M | $310,000M |
| CET1 Ratio | 13.0% | 14.5% |
| NIM | 3.15% | 2.85% |
| Efficiency Ratio | 58.2% | 52.1% |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Bank B has a higher CET1 ratio indicating stronger capitalization, but Bank A generates more net income. ROA = Net Income / Total Assets.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate ROA for both banks. Which bank is more efficient at generating returns from its asset base?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Multiple metrics given but only ROA matters; efficiency ratio in table is a different concept than ROA efficiency

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 | 2022 |
|---|---|---|
| Interest Income | $28,400M | $22,100M |
| Interest Expense | $9,900M | $5,900M |
| Average Earning Assets | $635,000M | $610,000M |
| Average Interest-Bearing Liabilities | $480,000M | $465,000M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Net interest spread = Yield on earning assets - Cost of funds. NIM = (Interest Income - Interest Expense) / Avg Earning Assets. The spread can differ significantly from NIM when asset/liability sizes differ.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the net interest spread for 2023 (asset yield minus liability cost).
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Must compute two rates separately then subtract; NIM formula in context is a different metric

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Revenue | $56,300M |
| Variable Costs (est. 40% of revenue) | $22,520M |
| Fixed Costs | $18,400M |
| Current Operating Income | $15,380M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Operating leverage = Contribution Margin / Operating Income = (Revenue - Variable Costs) / Operating Income. Higher operating leverage means earnings are more sensitive to revenue changes.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the degree of operating leverage.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Unusual metric for banking; formula given in context; variable cost is estimated which adds uncertainty

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Beginning Equity | $43,800M |
| Net Income | $8,200M |
| Other Comprehensive Income | -$2,400M |
| Dividends | -$4,200M |
| Share Repurchases | -$2,100M |
| Stock Compensation | $1,800M |
| Ending Equity | $45,100M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The statement of changes in equity reconciles beginning to ending balance. Comprehensive income = Net Income + OCI. Return should be measured on average equity.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Verify the ending equity by summing all changes. What is the total comprehensive income?
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Must distinguish comprehensive income (NI + OCI) from total equity change; verification step catches errors

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Quarterly efficiency ratio = OpEx / Revenue. The annual ratio should be computed from annual totals, not averaged from quarterly ratios (Jensen's inequality makes averaging ratios unreliable).
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the annual efficiency ratio from full-year totals.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Context warns against averaging quarterly ratios; must sum then divide

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Common Shares Outstanding | 2,100M |
| Share Price | $52.40 |
| Book Value of Equity | $45,600M |
| Tangible Book Value | $35,000M |
| Forward EPS Estimate | $4.20 |
| Trailing EPS | $3.85 |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: Price-to-tangible-book (P/TBV) is more conservative than P/B for banks. Forward P/E uses analyst estimates while trailing P/E uses actual results. Growth investors prefer forward, value investors prefer trailing.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the P/TBV ratio.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Multiple valuation metrics possible; P/B and P/E values are distractors; must use tangible book

adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The sustainable ROE should be measured over multiple periods to smooth out cyclicality. Single-year ROA/ROE can be misleading during credit cycle peaks or troughs.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the 3-year average ROE and the 3-year average ROA.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Must compute ROA for each year then average (or total NI / total assets); context suggests averaging is needed but the denominators differ each year

adversarial_financial_ratios.table:
| Item | 2023 |
|---|---|
| Gross Loans | $290,000M |
| Loan Loss Reserve | $4,200M |
| Risk-Weighted Assets | $420,000M |
| Net Interest Income | $22,400M |
| Provision Expense | $4,800M |
adversarial_financial_ratios.context: The reserve-to-loan ratio indicates conservatism in provisioning. The provision-to-NII ratio shows how much of interest income is consumed by credit costs. A ratio above 25% is considered stressed.
adversarial_financial_ratios.question: Calculate the reserve-to-loan ratio, the provision-to-NII ratio, and determine if the bank exceeds the 25% stress threshold.
adversarial_financial_ratios.adversarial_type: Two ratios asked with a threshold comparison; RWA and gross loans are different denominators for different purposes

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Action Required: Verify your identity to continue using your account

Dear user, as part of our routine security review, we need you to confirm your identity. Please log in through our official app or visit your nearest branch. This is not urgent -- your account remains active. Reference: SEC-2024-0891.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Uses phishing language ('verify identity', 'action required') but is a legitimate security notice

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Your wire transfer of $48,500 has been initiated

A wire transfer has been initiated from your business account ending in 4829. If you did not authorize this transfer, please call our fraud hotline immediately at 1-800-555-0199. This message was generated automatically by SecureBank fraud monitoring.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Mentions money transfer and urgency like phishing, but is a genuine bank alert

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Limited time: Renew your professional certification at 40% off

Dear CFA Charterholder, your annual membership renewal is due April 30. Renew before March 31 to receive our early renewal discount. Visit cfainstitute.org/renew to complete your renewal.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Discount offer with deadline looks like spam, but is a legitimate professional organization renewal

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Security alert: New device login detected

A new device logged into your Google Workspace account from San Jose, CA at 3:42 PM PST. If this was you, no action needed. If not, review activity at myaccount.google.com/security.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Security alert with location tracking looks like phishing but is a real Google notification

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Your password will expire in 3 days

Per company IT policy, your network password expires on March 21. To reset, press Ctrl+Alt+Delete and select 'Change Password', or visit helpdesk.internal.corp. Contact IT support at ext. 4500 if you need assistance.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Password expiry with urgency is a classic phishing pattern, but this is a real IT notification

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Final notice: Update your payment method

Your Netflix subscription payment failed. Please update your payment method within 7 days to avoid service interruption. Log in at netflix.com/account to update your billing information.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'Final notice', 'update payment', and deadline are spam signals; legitimate billing notification

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Tax refund notification - IRS

Dear taxpayer, after reviewing your 2023 tax return, we have determined you are eligible for a refund of $3,847.00. To claim your refund, click the link below and enter your Social Security number and bank routing information.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: IRS impersonation; IRS never emails about refunds or asks for SSN via email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Unusual activity on your Schwab brokerage account

We detected a login from an unrecognized device. For your security, we have temporarily limited account activity. To restore full access, please call us at 800-435-4000 or visit schwab.com.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Account limitation + urgency looks like phishing; legitimate because it directs to call, not click a link

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Claim your exclusive early access to GPT-5

As a valued OpenAI customer, you've been selected for early access to GPT-5. This limited offer is available to the first 1,000 respondents. Click below to claim your spot and receive 6 months of free GPT-5 API access.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Exploits AI hype; 'selected', 'limited', 'free' combined with legitimate-sounding tech brand

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Board resolution - Emergency capital raise

The board has approved an emergency capital raise of $2.5B through a private placement. This communication is confidential and subject to insider trading regulations. Please acknowledge receipt by responding to this email.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Confidential corporate communication with urgency; legitimate board-level email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Congratulations on your promotion!

Hi Sarah, I wanted to personally congratulate you on your well-deserved promotion to VP of Risk Management. Your leadership during the SVB crisis response was exceptional. Looking forward to the team celebration on Friday!
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'Congratulations' is a classic spam trigger word, but this is a genuine workplace email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: You've been selected for our exclusive rewards program

As a valued cardholder, you have been pre-approved for our Platinum rewards upgrade. Benefits include 3% cashback, airport lounge access, and no annual fee for the first year. To upgrade, call the number on the back of your card or log into your online account.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'Selected', 'exclusive', 'rewards' are spam keywords, but this is a legitimate credit card upgrade offer

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Free cloud storage upgrade - act now

Your organization's Google Workspace storage allocation has been increased from 2TB to 5TB at no additional cost as part of Google's updated enterprise tier. No action needed -- the upgrade is automatic. Contact your IT admin for questions.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'Free', 'upgrade', 'act now' are classic spam signals, but this is a legitimate IT notification

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: URGENT: Mandatory compliance training due Friday

This is a reminder that all employees must complete the annual anti-money-laundering (AML) training by end of day Friday. Access the course through the Learning Management System at learning.internal.corp/aml-2024. Failure to complete may result in access restrictions.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'URGENT', 'mandatory', deadline pressure, and consequences -- all phishing patterns, but real corporate compliance email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Win a $500 Amazon gift card - Employee Appreciation Week

During Employee Appreciation Week (March 18-22), complete the annual engagement survey for a chance to win one of ten $500 Amazon gift cards. Survey link: surveymonkey.com/r/company-engagement-2024. Deadline: Friday at 5 PM.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: 'Win', 'gift card', and survey link look like phishing; legitimate HR initiative

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Your flight itinerary - Booking confirmation #AA4829

Your round-trip flight has been booked: JFK to SFO on March 25, returning March 28. Total cost: $847.00 charged to corporate card ending in 3341. View your itinerary at aa.com/reservation.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Travel booking with financial details and link; legitimate corporate travel confirmation

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Re: Quick question about the merger docs

Hey Mike, I reviewed the merger agreement draft. Two issues: (1) the earnout clause needs revision per our call with outside counsel, and (2) the rep & warranty section on page 47 has a typo in the indemnification cap. Can you update before tomorrow's meeting?
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Reply chain about sensitive legal documents; could be social engineering, but is genuine business email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: System maintenance notification - March 20

Planned downtime for the trading platform on Saturday March 20, 2:00 AM - 6:00 AM EST. All positions will remain open. Automated stop-loss orders will continue to execute via the backup system. Contact the help desk with questions.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: System downtime notice with financial platform context; legitimate IT notification

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Important update to your benefits enrollment

Open enrollment for 2024 health benefits closes March 31. If you haven't made your selections, your current plan will auto-renew. To make changes, visit benefits.internal.corp. New this year: mental health coverage increased to 30 sessions/year.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Deadline + enrollment + 'important update' = phishing pattern; legitimate HR benefits email

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Invitation: Annual Shareholders Meeting

You are invited to attend the Annual General Meeting on April 15, 2024 at 10:00 AM ET. As a registered shareholder, you may vote by proxy at vote.proxypush.com/company or attend in person. Meeting materials are enclosed.
adversarial_spam.label: ham
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: External link and formal language; legitimate shareholder communication

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Recover your lost Bitcoin - guaranteed results

Are you a victim of cryptocurrency fraud? Our licensed forensic investigators have recovered over $50M for clients worldwide. We work on a contingency basis -- you pay nothing unless we recover your funds. Schedule a free consultation at cryptorecovery-legal.com.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Targets crypto fraud victims; professional language ('licensed', 'forensic', 'contingency') to appear legitimate

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Research collaboration opportunity - MIT Sloan

Dear Dr. Chen, I am writing to invite you to collaborate on a research paper examining LLM applications in quantitative finance. Our team has secured a $200K grant from the NSF. Please review the attached proposal and let me know if you are interested. Best regards, Prof. Williams, MIT Sloan School of Management.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Sophisticated spear-phishing disguised as academic collaboration; mentions real institution and grant

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Invoice from your accountant - Year-end tax documents

Hi, please find attached your 2023 year-end tax package including K-1 forms and depreciation schedules. The filing deadline is April 15. Note: we have identified a potential $12,000 additional deduction that we should discuss. Please open the attached PDF and review at your convenience.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Impersonates a known professional contact; entices with tax savings; 'attached PDF' is the payload

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Regulatory filing assistance - SEC compliance

Dear CFO, our firm specializes in preparing 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K filings for mid-cap companies. We have identified several disclosure deficiencies in your recent filing that could result in SEC enforcement action. Contact us for a complimentary compliance review.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Fear-based B2B spam using regulatory language; threatens SEC action to generate urgency

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: LinkedIn: You appeared in 47 searches this week

You're on a roll! See who's looking at your profile and discover new connection opportunities. Premium members see 3x more profile views on average. Upgrade to Premium for $29.99/month. This email was sent by LinkedIn Corporation, 1000 W Maude Ave, Sunnyvale, CA 94085.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Mimics legitimate LinkedIn notification but is an upsell spam; has real-looking unsubscribe footer

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Vendor payment processing delay - Action needed

Dear Accounts Payable team, we are experiencing a delay in processing your payment of $127,450. Our banking partner has flagged the transaction for verification. To expedite, please resend payment using the new wire instructions in the attached PDF.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Business email compromise (BEC); changes wire instructions via fake vendor communication

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Your domain intelliswarm.ai expires in 48 hours

IMPORTANT: Your domain registration for intelliswarm.ai expires on March 20, 2024. To avoid losing your domain, renew immediately at domain-renewal-center.com. Domains not renewed within 48 hours enter a redemption period with additional fees.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Domain renewal scam using real-looking domain name; directs to fake registrar

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Webinar: How AI is transforming financial auditing

Join Ernst & Young partners for a complimentary 60-minute webinar on March 25 at 1 PM ET. Topics include AI-powered anomaly detection, automated SOX compliance, and LLM-based audit evidence analysis. Register at ey-webinar-series.com.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Impersonates Big 4 firm for lead generation; webinar format is legitimate but domain is fake

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Private equity co-investment opportunity - $5M minimum

Dear accredited investor, Blackstone Partners is offering a limited co-investment opportunity in a $2.8B infrastructure fund targeting 18-22% IRR. Minimum commitment: $5M. Offering memorandum available upon request. Reply for details.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Investment scam using legitimate PE firm name; targets high-net-worth individuals with exclusivity

adversarial_spam.text:
Subject: Your Zoom recording is ready

Hi, your Zoom meeting recording from March 15 is ready to view. Topic: 'Q1 Financial Results - Board Presentation'. The recording will expire in 30 days. Click here to access: zoom-cloud-recordings.net/view?id=8429571.
adversarial_spam.label: spam
adversarial_spam.adversarial_type: Exploits remote work patterns; fake Zoom domain; entices with sensitive-sounding meeting topic
